# rafiki

> local-first AI image generation, batch prompt runs, browser review, and HTML-to-PNG rendering.

rafiki is a local-first creative-asset workflow by Kris Krüg / BC + AI. It generates
images via Gemini and OpenAI, runs markdown prompt batches into isolated run-* dirs,
serves a local review and rating portal, and renders HTML to PNG with Puppeteer. It
runs from a local checkout; API keys never leave your machine. No hosted service.

## Key files
- [README](README.md): what it is and the quickstart
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): how agents should operate in this repo
- docs/use-cases/keynote-visual-workflow.md: the main public workflow
- docs/ROADMAP.md: where it is going

## Links
